passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 30-36): Six people, Ram, Som, Tinu, Viju and Om were all born in the same day of the year, but each was born in a different year during a single six-year period. i) Prem is older than Som. ii) Ram is older than both Tinu and Viju. iii) Om is two years older than Tinu. iv) Prem was born either in 1962 or in 1963. v) The oldest member of the group was born in 1960.

Directions (Q. 37-43): A jazz group plans to play six pieces - J, K, L, M, N and O during a set. Each piece will be played exactly once. The order in which the pieces are to be played is subject to the following conditions: i) must be played before J and before O. ii) M must be played later than J. iii) K must be the third piece. iv) Which of the following could be the order in which the pieces are played? 1) L, N, O, M, J 2) M, O, M, L, K, J 3) N, L, J, O, L, K 4) M, K, J, O, L, N

choices.e: Viju, Ram, Prem, Tinu, Som, Om
